basic_details.job_title: NIHR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Project Technical Support, Project Nurse and More Positions Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support, Project Nurse and More
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Project Technical Support III and Project Nurse III, Max 28 years for Project Technical Support I. Age relaxation as per rules.
age_limit.details: Project Technical Support III: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation as per rules. Project Technical Support I: Maximum 28 years. Age relaxation as per rules. Project Nurse III: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Science/BAMS/BHMS with 3 years experience OR Post-Graduate degree; 10th + Diploma with 2 years experience OR 3 years Graduate degree with 1 year experience; Four-year Nursing course.
qualification.details: Project Technical SupporT III: Graduate in Science/BAMS/BHMS + 3 years' post Qualification experience OR Post-Graduate degree (Zoology/Biochemistry/Sociology /MPH/ Population Sci.). Experience of 2 Yrs on maternal and child health patients/Community-based health survey/ field work /laboratory work is also required. Project Technical Support I: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent) + two Years experience in relevant subject / field OR Three years Graduate degree + one year experience in Laboratory work/ data collection / data entry. Project Nurse III: Four-year Nursing course.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month (Consolidated) for Project Technical Support III; Rs. 18,000/- + HRA per month for Project Technical Support I; Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month fixed without any other allowances for Project Nurse III
salary_details.details: Project Technical Support III: Rs.28,000/- + HRA per month (Consolidated) Project Technical Support I: Rs. 18,000/- + HRA per month. Project Nurse III: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month fixed without any other allowances

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (wherever applicable)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIHR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10 July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all necessary documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the NIHR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Project Human Resource Positions across various categories in the NIHR Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Technical Support – I?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Project Technical Support – I is 10th pass with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent) and two years of experience, or a three-year Graduate degree with one year of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Technical Support - III?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Technical Support - III is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Nurse - III?
faq.answer: Project Nurse - III will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month without any other allowances.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for NIHR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Jodhpur, Rajasthan, with the pincode 342005.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original certificates, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the job type for these positions is temporary.
